claims.statement_uk: Активна продуктова лінія має назву Versie 1; наступну Versie власник не авторизував.
claims.statement_en: The active product line is named Versie 1; the owner has not authorized the next Versie.

evidence.result: The request fixes the active product at Versie 1 and sets next-version authorization to no.

claims.statement_uk: Minute trigger запускає bounded realtime fan-out перед maintenance і frozen recovery.
claims.statement_en: The minute trigger runs bounded realtime fan-out before maintenance and frozen recovery.

evidence.result: checkNewMail_ invokes realtime fan-out first.
The trigger-order regression contract passed in the 432/432 run.

claims.statement_uk: Realtime lane має per-connection state, 15-хвилинне bounded window, overlap, lag, ліміт 25 повідомлень і bounded retries.
claims.statement_en: The realtime lane has per-connection state, a bounded 15-minute window, overlap, lag, a 25-message limit, and bounded retries.

evidence.result: The committed constants and state-key construction implement these bounds.

claims.statement_uk: Frozen scanner лишається crash-resumable bounded backfill і не є realtime lane.
claims.statement_en: The frozen scanner remains a crash-resumable bounded backfill mechanism and is not the realtime lane.

evidence.result: runMailCheck_ retains the frozen page-based scanner after the realtime entry.
Frozen paging and realtime/frozen boundary contracts passed in the 432/432 run.

claims.statement_uk: `activeConnectionId` керує UI, тоді як automatic notification fan-out використовує `notificationConnectionIds`.
claims.statement_en: `activeConnectionId` controls UI selection while automatic notification fan-out uses `notificationConnectionIds`.

evidence.result: Active, unified, and notification connection sets are stored separately and updated independently.
Realtime and manual checks consume notification scopes rather than only the active UI connection.

claims.statement_uk: Одна Gmail-подія резервує одну фізичну Telegram-картку; account identity і connection-scoped callbacks зберігають контекст без копії для кожного view.
claims.statement_en: One Gmail event reserves one physical Telegram card; account identity and connection-scoped callbacks preserve context without a copy per view.

evidence.result: Card property keys and callbacks bind Gmail message, connection, and chat context.
Connection-bound card and at-most-once contracts passed in the 432/432 run.

claims.statement_uk: Перед hard-capacity guard індекс Telegram-карток видаляє duplicate та missing-property keys, не змінюючи live record.
claims.statement_en: Before the hard-capacity guard, the Telegram card index removes duplicate and missing-property keys without changing a live record.

evidence.result: The raw index read was replaced by compactTelegramMailCardIndexLocked_(props).keys.
The test uses 90 ghost keys and asserts byte-identical preservation of the live card record.

claims.statement_uk: До v47 capacity guard рахував сирий card index, включно з duplicate/stale/missing entries; перший patch також пропустив фактичний read у reservation path.
claims.statement_en: Before v47, the capacity guard counted the raw card index, including duplicate/stale/missing entries; the first patch also missed the actual reservation-path read.

evidence.result: Both save and reservation capacity reads changed from the raw index to the compacted key set.
The corrected guard behavior passed locally.

claims.statement_uk: До v48 realtime path використовував довгий legacy `UserLock`, через що contention міг блокувати швидку смугу.
claims.statement_en: Before v48, the realtime path used the long legacy `UserLock`, so contention could block the fast lane.

evidence.result: runRealtimeMailCheck_ stopped acquiring UserLock and moved to a per-lane property lease.
The test proves the realtime lane never calls getUserLock.

claims.statement_uk: Поточна realtime lane claim/commit/release використовує короткий `ScriptLock` і per-lane lease; Gmail/Telegram I/O не утримує legacy UserLock.
claims.statement_en: The current realtime lane uses a short `ScriptLock` and per-lane lease for claim/commit/release; Gmail/Telegram I/O does not hold the legacy UserLock.

evidence.result: Claim, commit, and release are isolated under short ScriptLock sections.
Per-lane lease behavior and zero UserLock calls passed.

claims.statement_uk: Retention є bounded і від’єднує локальний record лише для definitive Telegram `delete_too_old`; інші failures залишаються fail-closed.
claims.statement_en: Retention is bounded and detaches a local record only for definitive Telegram `delete_too_old`; other failures remain fail-closed.

evidence.result: The purge path classifies definite too-old deletion separately.
The retention contract proves only definite too-old cards are detached.

claims.statement_uk: Transcript повідомляє live capacity `72→60` і доставку queued card у v50, але цей runtime результат у REQ-0012 повторно не перевірявся.
claims.statement_en: The transcript reports live capacity `72→60` and queued-card delivery in v50, but REQ-0012 did not independently reverify that runtime result.
limitations: A current E4/E5 runtime readback was outside this documentation reconstruction.

claims.statement_uk: Повідомлення з одночасними labels `INBOX` і `SENT` є відтвореним duplicate-notification ризиком; v55 пригнічує його й durable-mark-ить seen у realtime.
claims.statement_en: A message carrying both `INBOX` and `SENT` labels is a reproduced duplicate-notification risk; v55 suppresses it and durably marks it seen in realtime.

evidence.result: The common eligibility helper rejects SENT and realtime persists the identifier as seen.
The INBOX+SENT fixture produced zero cards and was not refetched on the next cycle.

claims.statement_uk: v55 застосовує єдиний Gmail label-eligibility invariant до realtime, quarantine retry і frozen scanner.
claims.statement_en: v55 applies one Gmail label-eligibility invariant to realtime, quarantine retry, and the frozen scanner.

evidence.result: All three automatic delivery paths call gmailNotificationLabelsEligible_.

claims.statement_uk: v55 видалив staging-only mailbox mutation surface v54 і зберіг read-only trace.
claims.statement_en: v55 removed the v54 staging-only mailbox mutation surface and retained read-only tracing.

evidence.result: Spam-to-Inbox mutation entrypoints and trace_action handling were removed.
The v55 test asserts the mutation function and source surface are absent.

claims.statement_uk: Поточний v55 candidate пройшов усі 19 локальних test files: 432/432.
claims.statement_en: The current v55 candidate passed all 19 local test files: 432/432.
conflicts: The source-time statement marked v55 tests unverified; this E3 run supersedes only that local-test status.

evidence.method: Node test runner executed over the complete apps-script test directory
evidence.result: 19 files completed with 432 passed and 0 failed.

evidence.method: Release-contract subset included in the same run
evidence.result: The v55 hash pin and safety contract passed.

claims.statement_uk: v55 `PreflightOnly` пройшов fail-closed: stable v50, legacy staging v54, current staging 0, candidate hashes exact, `readyToStage=true`.
claims.statement_en: v55 `PreflightOnly` passed fail-closed: stable v50, legacy staging v54, current staging 0, exact candidate hashes, and `readyToStage=true`.
conflicts: The source-time statement marked v55 preflight unverified; this E3 run supersedes only preflight status.

evidence.result: Result: stableVersion 50, legacyStagingCount 1, stagingCount 0, immutableReady false, readyToStage true, all candidate hashes matched.

claims.statement_uk: REQ-0012 не створював immutable v55, staging deployment або production promotion.
claims.statement_en: REQ-0012 did not create immutable v55, a staging deployment, or a production promotion.
dependencies: Fresh read-only Apps Script deployment state for E4 confirmation

evidence.result: The published v55 update records local verification and no deployment.

limitations: Repository and local preflight evidence do not prove that external state has not drifted since the last readback.

claims.statement_uk: v50 як historical stable production і v54 як historical immutable/staging є report-backed, але не були повторно підтверджені live у REQ-0012.
claims.statement_en: v50 as historical stable production and v54 as historical immutable/staging are report-backed but were not live-reconfirmed in REQ-0012.

evidence.result: The project history records the v42-v55 release progression and distinguishes stable, staging, and local-only states.

limitations: Current Apps Script E4 readback was not rerun.

claims.statement_uk: Поточний release helper pin-ить rollback v50, legacy staging v54 і candidate v55 із exact SHA-256 bundle.
claims.statement_en: The current release helper pins rollback v50, legacy staging v54, and candidate v55 with an exact SHA-256 bundle.

evidence.result: RollbackVersion=50, LegacyStagingVersion=54, CandidateVersion=55, and all candidate hashes are pinned.

claims.statement_uk: Послідовність v42–v54 зберігається як historical lineage всередині Versie 1, а не як паралельні поточні продуктові випуски.
claims.statement_en: The v42-v54 sequence is retained as historical lineage inside Versie 1, not as parallel current product releases.

evidence.result: The postmortem preserves the historical Apps Script sequence while the product remains Versie 1.

limitations: Commit and documentation history do not independently prove every historical runtime claim.

claims.statement_uk: Попередня сесія повідомляла preflight failures через stale hard-coded hashes і відсутні compatibility scripts; без Git evidence ці конкретні діагнози залишаються historical transcript claims.
claims.statement_en: The previous session reported preflight failures from stale hard-coded hashes and missing compatibility scripts; without matched Git evidence, those specific diagnoses remain historical transcript claims.
limitations: The relevant historical working-tree snapshot was not pinned by the source span.

claims.statement_uk: Release path є fail-closed: exact hashes перевіряються до StageOnly/Promote, а stable rollback не змінюється через звичайний preflight.
claims.statement_en: The release path is fail-closed: exact hashes are checked before StageOnly/Promote, and ordinary preflight does not change the stable rollback.

evidence.result: Mutation modes are explicit, mutually exclusive, mutex-protected, and reached only after hash assertions.

claims.statement_uk: Transcript приписує callback failure службовим `authuser/prompt/scope` і пропонує controlled relay, але REQ-0012 не перевіряв OAuth flow live.
claims.statement_en: The transcript attributes callback failure to service `authuser/prompt/scope` parameters and proposes a controlled relay, but REQ-0012 did not verify the OAuth flow live.
limitations: No OAuth callback, token exchange, consent, or browser flow was run in this phase.

claims.statement_uk: Production acceptance другого Gmail account лишається заблокованим новою user-specific Google consent.
claims.statement_en: Production acceptance for the second Gmail account remains blocked on new user-specific Google consent.
dependencies: Owner completion of the specific Google consent screen
limitations: The gate must not be bypassed or mixed with another account zone.

claims.statement_uk: Production one-card acceptance для v55 ще не виконано.
claims.statement_en: Production one-card acceptance for v55 has not yet been performed.
limitations: Local E3 tests and preflight are not E4/E5 runtime evidence.

claims.statement_uk: Власник дозволив автономні routine PC/browser/Git/test/recovery actions; CAPTCHA, OTP/passkey/physical і суттєві unsafe choices залишаються manual gates.
claims.statement_en: The owner authorized autonomous routine PC/browser/Git/test/recovery actions; CAPTCHA, OTP/passkey/physical actions, and materially unsafe choices remain manual gates.

evidence.result: P-006 records autonomous continuation and the explicit manual gates.

claims.statement_uk: Повтор твердження у transcript, summary або postmortem не підвищує його вище E0 без primary evidence.
claims.statement_en: Repeating a statement in a transcript, summary, or postmortem does not raise it above E0 without primary evidence.

claims.statement_uk: Не утримувати shared UserLock під час Gmail/Telegram I/O; claim/commit state слід ізолювати коротким lane-specific lease.
claims.statement_en: Do not hold a shared UserLock during Gmail/Telegram I/O; isolate claim/commit state with a short lane-specific lease.

claims.statement_uk: Capacity guard має рахувати лише deduplicated keys із наявними records і не повинен видаляти active card як спосіб звільнення slot.
claims.statement_en: A capacity guard must count only deduplicated keys with present records and must not delete an active card merely to free a slot.

claims.statement_uk: Dedupe invariant треба застосовувати на спільній eligibility boundary усіх delivery lanes; окремий patch лише realtime залишає retry/backlog divergence.
claims.statement_en: Apply the dedupe invariant at the shared eligibility boundary of every delivery lane; patching only realtime leaves retry/backlog divergence.

claims.statement_uk: Перед release потрібно запускати exact-hash tests і PreflightOnly; stale pins виправляються новим immutable history commit, а не force/reset або ручним обходом guard.
claims.statement_en: Before release, run exact-hash tests and PreflightOnly; fix stale pins in a new immutable history commit rather than force/reset or manually bypassing guards.
